figures.caption: TABLE VI: Class-wise precision, recall, and F1-score under the aggressive 6× compression budget. Values are reported as mean ± standard error (%). Bold entries denote the best performance per row across the baseline and compressed models.

Fig. 5: Pareto trade-off analysis across hyper-parameter configurations. Each point corresponds to a unique combination of Ks, Kc, τ , and rmax. Pareto-optimal configurations are highlighted. The baseline model is shown as a red circle, with the dashed line indicating baseline accuracy. The four panels illustrate trade-offs between accuracy and (top-left) FLOPs, (top-right) latency, (bottom-left) parameter compression ratio, and (bottom-right) model size.
Fig. 1: Overview of the proposed hierarchical spatio-channel low-rank compression framework.

TABLE IV: Class-wise precision, recall, and F1-score at the moderate 3× compression budget. Values are reported as mean ± standard error (%). For each metric row, the highest value among all methods is highlighted in bold.
